title: Add Gopi Dresses section with uploaded product images

requirements.text: Add a dedicated 'Gopi Dresses' product section on the homepage. Seed 2–3 Gopi Dress products in the backend under a 'Gopi Dress' category with 'Price Updating Soon' (null price) and WhatsApp Buy Now buttons. Display this section on the homepage alongside the existing Jaipuri Skirts, Short Kurtis, and Sarees sections, using the same red/golden Jaipuri theme styling.

quotes: gopi dresses ka section add kr do

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Gopi Dresses' section appears on the homepage
Backend seeds 2–3 products under a 'Gopi Dress' category with null/optional price
Each product card shows 'Price Updating Soon' label
Each product card has a 'Buy Now' WhatsApp order button
Section uses the red/golden Jaipuri visual theme consistent with other sections

requirements.text: Map the previously uploaded product images (IMG_4047-1.jpeg, IMG_4047-2.jpeg, IMG_4044-1.jpeg, IMG_4044-2.jpeg, IMG_4045-1.jpeg, IMG_4045-2.jpeg, IMG_4048-1.jpeg, IMG_4048-2.jpeg) as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and update the backend seed imageUrl values for all existing products (Jaipuri Skirts and Short Kurtis) to reference these local asset paths. Ensure the Gopi Dresses section products also use appropriate uploaded images from the same set if available.

quotes: meine jo image di h vo dalo
photo lga do jo meine diye h

acceptanceCriteria: IMG_4047-1.jpeg, IMG_4044-1.jpeg, IMG_4045-1.jpeg are served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Backend seed imageUrl values for Jaipuri Skirt products point to /assets/generated/IMG_4047-1.jpeg, /assets/generated/IMG_4044-1.jpeg, /assets/generated/IMG_4045-1.jpeg respectively
Backend seed imageUrl for Short Kurti product points to /assets/generated/IMG_4048-1.jpeg
Product images render correctly in their respective section cards on the homepage

constraints: Do not change the existing red/golden Jaipuri visual theme
Do not add any payment processing — Buy Now buttons must open WhatsApp links only
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components) must not be modified
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme or color palette
Adding new pages beyond the homepage
Uploading new images — only the already-provided images should be used
